block.caption: Fig. 14.2 A configuration of a two-dimensional lattice gas. Solid circles represent atoms and open circles represent empty lattice sites.

overrides.reason: C4: 正文於 ch14 body[38] 引用 Figure 14.2；MinerU content_list 在 page_idx 361/362 間漏抓該圖，依 raw PDF page 362 補裁 Figure 14.2 圖與 caption 並插於引用段落後。
